scope.summary: A5 makes the script-free dashboard pairing form browser-compatible by serving only that secret-free page with Referrer-Policy: same-origin, while keeping literal Origin:null, query-secret replay, single-use ticket, CSRF, and route-action-ticket protections fail-closed.
out_of_scope: P-U3 structured dashboard 403-envelope polish remains a separate follow-up; native HTTP Origin guard refusals still use the existing plain 403 body.
A5 security review narrative is owned by oraclemcp-091-a5-secreview-0sdpx.
No pane 5 A1e files or VPD/RLS catalog work are touched.

entry_points.name: clean-worktree dashboard unit contract
entry_points.trace: `timeout 240 env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --lib dashboard -- --nocapture` exited 0 in /home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp-cod6-a5: 20 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored. Covered pairing query-secret refusal without consumption, body-only ticket exchange, single-use replay, 60s expiry, literal Origin:null pairing refusal without consumption, cross-origin action refusal, missing CSRF refusal, route action-ticket validation, and valid action dispatch.

entry_points.name: clean-worktree R3 browser lane
entry_points.trace: `timeout 900 env NODE_PATH=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/web/node_modules bash scripts/rig/rig_browser_lane.sh run --log` exited 0 in /home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp-cod6-a5: omcpb built oraclemcp, Playwright ran 2 Chromium tests, Chromium paired via POST -> 303 -> /, authenticated browser action POST returned 200, and EventSource resumed with Last-Event-ID.

entry_points.name: browser fixture discovery and TypeScript
entry_points.trace: `NODE_PATH=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/web/node_modules /home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/web/node_modules/.bin/playwright test --config web/playwright.live-serve.config.ts --list` listed the 2 Chromium R3/C4 tests, and `npm --prefix web exec -- tsc -p web/tsconfig.json --noEmit` exited 0 in the clean A5 worktree.

limitations: Evidence was produced from the clean temporary worktree /home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp-cod6-a5 because the shared checkout contained other agents' dirty work.
No workspace-wide cargo gate is claimed.
The change intentionally does not accept literal Origin:null; the native HTTP Origin guard still refuses that before dashboard dispatch.
